summary: Tenant Branding Feature Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified that branding settings (app name, tagline, logo, primary color) load correctly after login and are applied globally across the UI. Primary color is converted to HSL and applied to CSS custom properties (--primary, --accent, --ring). Changing branding color in Tenant Settings immediately updates the theme via refreshConfig(). Mobile header and sidebar correctly display custom branding.
passed_tests: Login as admin@nylaairwater.earth - SUCCESS
Branding loads after login - App name 'My Custom CRM' displayed in sidebar - SUCCESS
Branding loads after login - Tagline 'Test Tagline' displayed in sidebar - SUCCESS
Primary color #8b5cf6 applied to CSS variables (--primary: 258 90% 66%) - SUCCESS
Accent color applied to CSS variables (--accent: 258 90% 66%) - SUCCESS
Tenant primary color stored (--tenant-primary: #8b5cf6) - SUCCESS
Primary buttons use branding color (backgroundColor: rgb(137, 90, 246)) - SUCCESS
Sales context switcher uses primary color - SUCCESS
Active sidebar items use primary color with shadow - SUCCESS
Navigate to Tenant Settings -> Branding tab - SUCCESS
App name input shows 'My Custom CRM' - SUCCESS
Tagline input shows 'Test Tagline' - SUCCESS
Primary color picker shows #8b5cf6 - SUCCESS
Change primary color to teal #0d9488 - SUCCESS
Click Save Branding button - SUCCESS
Toast message 'Branding saved - theme updated' displayed - SUCCESS
CSS variables updated to teal (--primary: 175 84% 32%) - SUCCESS
refreshConfig() updates theme immediately without page reload - SUCCESS
Mobile header displays app name 'My Custom CRM' - SUCCESS
Mobile sidebar shows app name and tagline correctly - SUCCESS
Logo/avatar fallback logic in code (shows first letter when no logo) - VERIFIED IN CODE
critical_code_review_comments: TenantConfigContext.js: hexToHSL() function correctly converts hex colors to HSL format for CSS custom properties
DashboardLayout.js: Uses branding values from useTenantConfig() hook (logoUrl, appName, tagline)
DashboardLayout.js: Logo fallback shows first letter of appName when no logoUrl is set (line 221-227)
TenantSettings.js: saveBranding() calls refreshConfig() to update theme globally without page reload
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing tenant branding configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding feature is fully functional. Current tenant has: app_name='My Custom CRM', tagline='Test Tagline', primary_color='#8b5cf6' (purple). Key implementation: TenantConfigContext converts hex to HSL and applies to CSS custom properties, DashboardLayout uses branding from context, saveBranding calls refreshConfig() for immediate theme update.

logo_fallback.logic: Shows first letter of appName when no logoUrl
